blockers.description: npm install fails on WSL NTFS mount (EACCES permissions)
blockers.workaround: Use Docker (docker-compose up) or run npm from native Linux path outside /mnt/d/

context_notes: Phase 3 dashboard UI complete and polished. DashboardPage.jsx: single /dashboard route, 3-way ternary (loading/empty/has-projects), fadeInUp entry animations, cardExit/fadeOutUp exit animations, overlay add-project dropdown (no layout shift), kebab card menus, navbar debounced project search. All fetch calls now guard resp.ok before calling .json(). Phase 4 (Sprint Report) needs: Jira sprint API integration, /api/sprint/{project_key} backend endpoint, sprint bug list view + per-sprint history aggregation UI.
